state_history.note: Post-catalyst relative strength and volume flagged by equity scan.

penalties.note: Large-cap momentum may need a pullback before risk can be defined.

score.scoring_notes: High-quality liquid candidate, but entry definition is not yet clear.

hypothesis: NVDA may see post-catalyst drift if the market continues rewarding AI infrastructure leaders and sector breadth remains supportive.
evidence: NVDA is showing relative strength versus the broad market.
Volume is above baseline after a catalyst window.
counter_evidence: Upside may already reflect the catalyst.
A risk-off move in rates or mega-cap tech could invalidate the drift.
confirmation_needed: Pullback or consolidation creates a defined entry and stop.
No major filing or earnings detail contradicts the thesis.
invalidation: NVDA loses relative strength versus semiconductor peers.
Price closes below the defined post-catalyst support area.
Market regime turns against high-duration growth equities.
decision_reason: Worth attention, but not yet a trade candidate without a clean risk box.

model_vs_market.market_belief: Market is already pricing strong AI leadership and continued earnings strength.
model_vs_market.internal_view: The edge is not valuation surprise; it is potential post-catalyst drift if breadth and sector strength persist.
model_vs_market.notes: Requires fundamental/catalyst memo before any promotion.

blocking_reasons: Needs defined entry, stop, and target.
Needs sector and portfolio exposure check.

notes: Example candidate for equity catalyst-drift workflow.
